author: y4rr
content: GPU dropout backward landed. HiddenStatePredictor gets depth/dropout/input-norm knobs. Best cut 0.15 beats baseline Union on all metrics: recall 58.19% FPR 26.25% F1 0.437 vs baseline 57.46/22.83/0.411. Input LayerNorm + dropout both hurt slightly. k=2/4/8 indistinguishable. 85% recall out of reach on Gutenberg prose alone; next phase needs much bigger diverse corpus + attention-based architecture.
